posts.text: It’s merely a medal for clueless domestic crowds. And a collaborative effort from both US and CCP to push more countries into the hands of communist regime. People need to understand that most Chinese officials have their kids and properties in US. They are not opposing powers.

posts.text:
The funny thing is, I support his pay package issues which were in the news lately (they were fairly agreed upon) and I'm a fan of SpaceX (good stuff).

But my broad critique over the years is that Elon isn't an honest person.

So much is manufactured and curated. It's obvious.
